http.server/BaseHTTPRequestHandler/Messa.name: MessageClass
http.server/BaseHTTPRequestHandler/Messa.description: Specifies an email.message.Message-like class to parse HTTP headers. Typically, this is not overridden, and it defaults to http.client.HTTPMessage.

info.excerpt: Specifies an email.message.Message-like class to parse HTTP headers. Typically, this is not overridden, and it defaults to http.client.HTTPMessage.
